ast.source:
ngraph.graph: Starting from version 0.14 `uniqueLinkId` is deprecated.
Use `multigraph` option instead
ast.target: ngraph.graph: 从版本 0.14 起，`uniqueLinkId` 已弃用。\n请改用 `multigraph` 选项\n

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Note: there is also change in default behavior: From now on each graph
is considered to be not a multigraph by default (each edge is unique).
ast.target: 注意：默认行为也发生了变化：从现在起，每个图形\n默认不被视为多重图（每条边都是唯一的）。

ast.source: Color nodes with custom rules. Use "path:", "tag:", "file:", or text match. Examples: path:folder, tag:#project, file:MyNote.md, file:*.pdf
ast.target: 使用自定义规则为节点着色。使用 \"path:\", \"tag:\", \"file:\" 或文本匹配。示例：path:folder, tag:#project, file:MyNote.md, file:*.pdf
